featuredEvents.title: Mumbai Coastal Cleanup
featuredEvents.description: Join a hands-on weekend cleanup to remove shoreline waste, guide visitors, and help protect the Mumbai coastline ecosystem.

featuredEvents.title: Cyber Security Awareness Drive
featuredEvents.description: Help educate local communities and small businesses on basic digital hygiene, safe online practices, and scam prevention.

featuredEvents.title: Rural Education Support Camp
featuredEvents.description: Provide weekend tutoring in mathematics and English, and help organize extracurricular learning activities for rural students.

suggested.name: Asha Kitchen Network
suggested.tagline: Help with food packing, route support, and beneficiary check-ins.

suggested.name: Swachh Bharat Collective
suggested.tagline: Lead micro-teams for cleanup, sorting, and awareness booths.

suggested.name: Rural Tech Mentors
suggested.tagline: Offer weekly guidance in coding, English, and interview prep to rural students.

spotlight.title: Chennai Floods Relief
spotlight.description: A flood support team needs 14 volunteers for relief kit packing and live helpline updates before 9 PM.

trending.label: #MumbaiMonsoon
trending.summary: Local neighborhood projects are organizing preemptive flood relief supplies.

trending.label: #DigitalIndia
trending.summary: Remote campaign teams are onboarding specialists for regional language digital support.

trending.label: #BloodDonationDelhi

trending.label: #LakeRevivalBLR
trending.summary: Short-time expert tasks for environmental planning and community mobilization.

chat.heading: Inbox
chat.subheading: Your conversations, requests, and live volunteer coordination.

featuredRequest.name: Nida Rahman
featuredRequest.message: Can you anchor the volunteer roster for tomorrow's medical camp? We need one person to manage check-in, routing, and urgent supply requests.

conversations.name: Asha Kitchen
conversations.snippet: We added one more delivery route near JP Nagar. Can you take the lead?

messages.author: other
messages.body: We added one more delivery route near JP Nagar. Can you take the lead?

messages.author: self
messages.body: Yes, I can handle the route if I get two more packing volunteers.

messages.author: other
messages.body: Perfect. I am looping in two first-time volunteers now.

conversations.name: Green Streets Crew
conversations.snippet: Rain tomorrow. Should we shift the cleanup briefing indoors?

messages.author: other
messages.body: Rain tomorrow. Should we shift the cleanup briefing indoors?

messages.author: self
messages.body: Yes. Let's move the briefing to the community hall and keep the sorting station outside if the rain eases.

conversations.name: Mentor Circle
conversations.snippet: Three students asked for mock interview slots this week.

messages.author: other
messages.body: Three students asked for mock interview slots this week.

messages.author: self
messages.body: I can take two of them on Thursday evening. Share the profiles and I will prepare role-specific questions.

profile.name: Riya Sharma
profile.about: I enjoy building calm, reliable systems for high-energy volunteer teams. My sweet spot is coordinating people, simplifying handoffs, and turning one-time contributors into long-term community members.
